data.title: Create KNOWN-ISSUES.md with 10 DSO incidents and smoke test
data.description: Create .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md with 10 incident entries (exit 144, path confusion, test timeout, venv not found, review gate blocks, nesting errors, hook cascades, ticket conflicts, PLUGIN_ROOT unbound, cascading failures). Each entry: ID/Keywords/Symptom/Root cause/Detection/Fix. Write smoke test at tests/scripts/test-known-issues-smoke.sh first (RED). Add .test-index mapping.
